detail: Read reverse-spec skill instructions and inspected msquic project files, README, BUILD.md, TEST.md, CMake options, test directories, and available local tools.
Checked local toolchain: CMake 3.28.3 and GCC 13.3.0 available; Ninja, Clang, and PowerShell unavailable. Submodules were initially missing.
Initialized project submodules including clog, googletest, openssl, quictls, and xdp-for-windows.
System OpenSSL 3.0.13 was below the required 3.5.0 version.
Configured CMake build with bundled quictls.
Built libmsquic.so and all three test executables.
Discovered 3 CTest suites and 3261 GTest cases: 541 core, 107 platform, 2613 API/protocol tests.
Full msquiccoretest CTest run exceeded four minutes without output; reran with SpinFrame.* excluded, producing 537 passed and 3 skipped out of 540 executed.
msquicplatformtest ran 107 tests: 106 passed, TlsTest.HandshakeCertFromFile failed by assertion because certificate parameters were null.
Representative msquictest filtered run executed 43 tests: 40 passed; ValidateXdpMapConfigParam, ValidateExecutionContext, and ValidatePartition failed by assertions.
Environment setup, build, discovery, and representative test execution succeeded; observed failures were assertion failures, not environment setup errors.
